name_en: In stock 💥 Gradient color 🇫🇷🇫🇷🇫🇷 39*42*8cm/3261; Small 35*37*7cm/3260 🆕 New Chanel Black-Silver Gradient! 22 Shopping Bag. Continues the classic quilted pattern and leather chain shoulder strap design. The appearance is simple and focuses on practical functions. The interior has a zip pocket and a removable small bag fixed by spring hooks. The opening is designed with a magnetic snap and a drawstring elastic band, presenting a lazy and casual style. A hollowed-out CHANEL double-C pendant adds a finishing touch. Made of soft and durable original oil-wax leather. The only high-end hardware in the market, the touch is truly invincible, and it is visibly spacious [Okay], it is too suitable as a mom bag, fitness enthusiasts can buy Dimensions:
